user_prompt:
Analyze this feedback and extract all issues:

Subject: Term Report
Source: REPORT
Date: 2026-02-28

Content:
End of term summary for Sofia (age 7, Year 2): Academics — Reading is below grade level; she reads at a Year 1 level and avoids reading tasks. Writing is disorganized with frequent letter reversals (b/d, p/q). Math is a relative strength. Social — She has one close friend but struggles in larger groups. She becomes overwhelmed at birthday parties and assemblies, covering her ears and asking to leave. Emotional — She has low self-esteem regarding academic work, frequently saying 'I'm stupid' and 'I can't do it'. She cries easily when corrected. Physical — She has an awkward pencil grip despite OT exercises last year. She tires easily during PE and avoids running activities. General — Sofia is a kind and creative child who excels in art and music. She needs significant support across multiple areas.

issues.title: Reading below grade level
issues.description: Sofia reads at a Year 1 level, which is below the expected level for Year 2, and avoids reading tasks.

issues.title: Disorganized writing with frequent letter reversals
issues.description: Her writing is disorganized and includes frequent reversals of letters b/d and p/q.

issues.title: Difficulty participating in larger social groups
issues.description: She has one close friend but struggles in larger groups, becomes overwhelmed at birthday parties and assemblies, covers her ears, and asks to leave.

issues.title: Low self-esteem regarding academic work
issues.description: She frequently says 'I'm stupid' and 'I can't do it' when engaging with academic tasks.

issues.title: Awkward pencil grip
issues.description: She has an awkward pencil grip despite having received occupational therapy exercises last year.

issues.title: Fatigue and avoidance during physical education
issues.description: She tires easily during PE and avoids running activities.
